visual_description: A dimly lit basement or attic space is illuminated only by a single hanging bulb, revealing exposed wiring and electrical panels on the walls. Through a doorway, a person in dark clothing stands beside a bed covered with a red blanket and a white pillow. The camera moves forward and pans left, showing brick walls and a wooden door before descending a hallway.
